705.reason: [When doPeek(peek) is null, the code increments cur and continues, potentially skipping the current token without parsing it. This is incorrect because it loses the token and may cause the parser to miss necessary syntax components.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [When doPeek(peek) is null, the code increments cur and continues, potentially skipping the current token without parsing it. This is incorrect because it loses the token and may cause the parser to miss necessary syntax components.]

1318.reason: Assumes next token is ';' without checking; may cause incorrect parse if missing ';'.

2111.reason: SyntaxType is a nested enum inside the Node class and is not imported or fully qualified, causing a compilation error. It should be referenced as Node.SyntaxType.Private.

1793.reason: Incorrectly uses doPeek(cur-1).getLineNo() instead of getCur().getLineNo() for the current ')' token

1611.reason: [This returns null without consuming the LPARENT token, causing the parser to get stuck in an infinite loop when backtracking because cur is not reset properly and the same tokens are re-parsed repeatedly]
